backward_compatibility.rationale: Internal routes, testids, and component structure are not public API; clean break simplifies refactor

legacy_code_removal.rationale: Project dead code policy: Delete, don't deprecate. Git history preserves everything.

option_selection.rationale: Full PuzzleSetPlayer Unification — user requested full compliance, DailyChallengePage failOnWrong is proven reference, InlineSolver duplicates 60% of SolverView
